name: All Bran Refrigerator Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix shortening, salt, sugar, and All-Bran with boiling water in a large bowl, stirring until the shortening melts.
2. Let the mixture stand until lukewarm.
3. Beat thoroughly to ensure no lumps remain.
4. Dissolve yeast in lukewarm water.
5. Add eggs to the dissolved yeast.
6. Gradually add flour to the yeast mixture, mixing until a dough forms.
7. Cover the dough and refrigerate it until ready to use.
8. Grease a baking pan.
9. Pinch off rolls from the dough using your hands.
10. Butter the tops of the rolls.
11. Let the rolls rise at room temperature until they double in size.
12. Bake in a 400-degree oven until golden brown.
